recommendations.title: Steven Universe: The Movie
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Two years after bringing peace to the galaxy, Steven Universe sees his past come back to haunt him in the form of a deranged Gem who wants to destroy the Earth.

recommendations.title: Brother Bear 2
recommendations.overview: Kenai finds his childhood human friend Nita and the two embark on a journey to burn the amulet he gave to her before he was a bear, much to Koda's dismay.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Hilda and the Mountain King
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Hilda wakes up in the body of a troll, she must use her wits and courage to get back home, become human again — and save the city of Trolberg.

recommendations.title: Robot Chicken: Star Wars
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, Action, TV Movie, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A series of 30 sketches, following the hilarious antics of various characters from a galaxy, far, far away.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb team up with the Avengers to save the world from Dr. Doofenshmirtz and a group of dangerous supervillains.

recommendations.title: Billy & Mandy's Big Boogey Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Comedy, Animation, TV Movie, Fantasy, Family

recommendations.director: Eddy Houchins, Christine Kolosov, Shaun Cashman, Phil Cummings, Gordon Kent, Kris Sherwood, Juli Murphy, Michel Lyman, Robert Alvarez, Sue Perrotto, Russell Calabrese, Matt Engstrom

recommendations.title: Ed, Edd n Eddy's Big Picture Show
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Animation, Adventure, TV Movie, Family, Drama, Mystery
recommendations.overview: When a scam goes horribly wrong and leaves the neighborhood kids furious, the Eds embark on a journey to find Eddy's brother in the "Ed, Edd, n Eddy" series finale.

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: Balto: Wolf Quest
recommendations.overview: Balto and his daughter Aleu embark on a journey of adventure and self discovery.
